Welcome to this game provided by Shanghai Aileyou Network Technology Co., Ltd. In accordance with the Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China, the Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China, the Information Security Technology - Personal Information Security Specification, the Provisions on the Scope of Necessary Personal Information for Common Types of Mobile Internet Applications, and other applicable laws, regulations and technical standards, we have drafted this Arrow Match Privacy Policy (hereinafter "this Privacy Policy"). If you have any objection or question about this Privacy Policy, you may contact us via the "Contact Us" details in Section 9.

Introduction: Please read this Privacy Policy carefully before using or continuing to use this game, especially the clauses in bold (minors should read this together with their legal guardian). If you do not agree with this policy, the game may not function normally or may not achieve the intended service effect, and you should stop using it. By checking "Agree and Enter" on the pop-up page, you confirm that you fully understand and agree to the entire content of this Privacy Policy.

This policy will help you understand the following:

 II. How we use your personal information

I. Personal information we may collect
When you use this game, we may need to collect and use some of your personal information, of two kinds: first, information necessary for the game's core functions - required for the game to run normally; second, information that may be collected for additional business features. This second kind supports optional features you may wish to experience in the game; if you decline to provide it, the specific additional feature may not work or may not achieve its intended effect, but this will not affect your normal use of the game's core functions.
When you use the account registration feature, you need to complete a series of registration steps per our guidance. During this process you need to provide us with: phone number, verification code match result. We collect this information to complete account registration, to provide you with continuous and stable service, and to protect your account security. Please note that your phone number and verification code match result are sensitive personal information; please consider carefully whether to provide them. We will treat your phone number and SMS information with a high degree of care (including strong encryption protection). We collect this information based on legal requirements; declining to provide it may prevent you from registering an account. If you choose to log in via a third-party account (including QQ, messenger apps, or social apps), with your unified authorization we will obtain your shared account information (including avatar and nickname) from the third party for authorized login into the game, and we will use your personal information in accordance with our agreement with the third party and applicable regulations.

When you run this game, in order to meet the requirements of relevant laws, regulations and authorities, verify the authenticity of your identity, implement anti-fraud and other risk controls, and safeguard system and service security, you are required to complete real-name verification. With your consent or when you voluntarily provide it, we will collect your real-name identity information (including name and ID number). Please note that real-name identity information is sensitive information, and we will treat it with a high degree of care (including strong encryption protection); please consider carefully whether to provide it. If you decline to provide your identity information, you may be unable to use our game services or may be subject to certain restrictions while using them. For the purpose of real-name verification, you agree that we may, ourselves or via an authorized third party, provide, query and verify the aforementioned identity information with relevant authorities. When you run this game, in order to identify abnormal account states, maintain normal operation of basic features, and improve your gaming experience, we need to collect device information you use, including device name, device model, operating system and version, client version, device resolution, package name, device settings, device identifiers (including MAC address, IMEI, IMSI, Android ID, IDFA, OAID, ICCID, MEID, GUID), WLAN access point information (including SSID, BSSID), hardware serial number, and Bluetooth information. To protect your game account security and foster a fair, healthy and safe gaming environment, we collect your device identifiers, hardware and OS information, installed application list, application process and game crash logs, mobile network information, and log information, in order to combat behavior that undermines fair play or disrupts normal game service (e.g. detecting piracy, scanning for cheats, preventing cheating). To implement in-game player faction grouping, we collect your IP address; the region corresponding to your IP address will be shown on your profile page and player faction page - shown down to province/city within mainland China, and as an unknown region outside it, based on network operator data. When you use the friend-circle feature in this game, with your explicit consent we collect your friend-list information under the corresponding account for historical leaderboard display; declining to provide this will only prevent full use of the related feature and will not affect your normal use of the game's other services. Pursuant to applicable laws, regulations and national standards, in the following circumstances we may collect and use your relevant personal information without seeking your prior authorization or consent:

II. How we may use your personal information
We will strictly comply with applicable laws and regulations and our agreements with you, and use the information we collect in accordance with this Privacy Policy and the User Agreement.
(1) Rules for using information: we use the information collected under Section I of this Privacy Policy according to the following rules:
1. We provide you with various features and services based on the information collected, including core game functions, player interaction features, payment features, software verification, software updates, and network syncing;
2. We analyze the game's operation based on your usage frequency and patterns, fault information, and performance information, to ensure service security and to optimize our products and improve service quality. We will not combine information stored in analytics software with the personal identity information you provide.
(2) Changes to information-use rules and renewed consent: we will use collected information only within the purposes covered by this Privacy Policy. If the scope of personal information we intend to use exceeds what is described in this Privacy Policy, we will amend this Privacy Policy before collecting your personal information, promptly notify you via pop-up, push notification or similar means, and obtain your explicit consent again.

III. How we store and protect your personal information
(1) Storage of personal information
1. Storage methods and periods: we store your information via secure means, including local storage (e.g. app data caching), databases, and server logs. We store your personal information only for as long as necessary to achieve the service purpose, or as required by law. Unless otherwise required by law or requested by you under this Privacy Policy, we will retain your personal information for the duration the game is in operation.
2. Storage location: pursuant to applicable laws and regulations, we store your personal information within mainland China.
3. Deletion of information: when the game ceases operation, or when we no longer need to retain your information under this Privacy Policy, the electronic records storing your personal information will be permanently deleted, and we will take reasonable measures to ensure the information cannot be recovered. Where we are required by law to continue retaining certain personal information, that information will be isolated from other types of information.
(2) Protection of personal information
1. Information security: under current equipment and technical conditions, we consistently and proactively take reasonable technical and managerial measures to safeguard the security of your account and personal information. We use collected information in good faith, take effective and necessary measures to protect your privacy, and use commercially reasonable security technologies to protect your privacy from unauthorized access, use or disclosure. We currently employ industry-leading technical protections, including but not limited to firewalls, encryption (e.g. SSL), de-identification or anonymization, and access-control measures (bastion hosts, two-factor verification, etc.).
We have established dedicated management systems, processes and organizational structures to safeguard personal information security. We only allow employees who need to know such information to access your personal information, and have set up strict access-control and monitoring mechanisms accordingly. We also require everyone who may come into contact with your information to fulfill corresponding confidentiality obligations; failure to do so will result in legal liability.
2. Response measures for security incidents: in the event of a personal information leak or other security incident, we will activate an emergency response plan to prevent the incident from escalating. If an information security incident occurs, we will notify you of the basic circumstances of the incident, the measures we have taken or plan to take, and our recommendations to you, via announcement, push notification, email or similar means. If individual notification is not feasible, we will issue a public warning by announcement or similar means.

V. How we use cookies and related technologies
Cookies are a neutral technology that lets a website server store data on, or read data from, the client. To optimize your experience, we use cookies or similar technologies (e.g. web beacons, log files, scripts, eTags) (collectively, "cookies"). Cookie technology generates small files on your device so that we can provide certain features. You may enable or disable cookies via your device or browser settings, but if you disable cookies you may be unable to use some features of our product.

VI. How we protect the rights of minors
We place great importance on protecting minors' personal information and continually explore updated protection methods. We actively implement anti-addiction protections for minors in accordance with national anti-addiction policy requirements. We use real-name identity verification to determine whether an account belongs to a minor; if you are determined to be a minor, you will be unable to use this game or service. See the Children's Privacy Protection Policy for details on minors' rights protection.
If a minor uses our service without the consent of their legal guardian, the guardian may contact us via the contact details in Section IX and request that we delete the minor's personal information; we will delete it immediately after verification.

VII. Your rights to manage your personal information
While you use the services we provide, we may, depending on the specific service, offer you corresponding operational settings so that you can query, copy, correct, supplement or delete your personal information, deregister your account, withdraw previously granted authorization, and obtain a copy of your personal information. In accordance with applicable laws and regulations, we guarantee that you may exercise the following rights over your personal information, which you may manage as follows: 1. If you need to query, copy, correct, supplement or delete your personal information in the game, or obtain a copy of it, you may contact zhangjiaxu@easygame2021.com. 2. If you need to withdraw or change previously granted authorization, you may change the scope of your authorization for us to continue collecting information by deleting information, disabling device features, or deregistering your account, among other means. You may also withdraw your consent to our collection of your personal information via the withdrawal feature in the top-right corner of the Privacy Policy screen. Please note that once you withdraw authorization, we will be unable to continue providing the specific features or services corresponding to that authorization, but your withdrawal will not affect the personal-information processing already carried out based on your prior authorization. 3. If you need to deregister your account and erase your information in the game, you may do so yourself via "Account Center" - "Request Account Deletion", or by contacting our official email zhangjiaxu@easygame2021.com. After receiving your deregistration request, we will respond within 15 business days, and will delete the aforementioned collected information within 2 business days, except as otherwise required by law. 4. If you entered the game via a third-party account, the personal information you provided to that third party when registering or logging in (including avatar, nickname, and identity-verification information) was not collected or stored by Shanghai Aileyou Network Technology Co., Ltd. - it is governed by your authorization to that third party, and Shanghai Aileyou Network Technology Co., Ltd. has no authority to deregister your third-party account. Please understand that third-party account deregistration is carried out through channels provided by the third party; Shanghai Aileyou Network Technology Co., Ltd. does not participate in that process and cannot make any promise or guarantee as to the validity of the third party's deregistration channel or whether deregistration succeeds.

VIII. How this Privacy Policy is updated
We want the products and services we provide you to be complete, so we continually improve them - which may mean frequently introducing new business features that may require collecting new personal information or changing the purpose or manner of using personal information. If there is a change in business features, in the cross-border transfer of personal information, in the purpose of use, or in the contact method for personal-information protection, we will revise this Privacy Policy accordingly, and will separately explain the purpose, content, manner and scope of such information collection via an updated Privacy Policy, pop-up notice, or similar means; you may choose whether to agree, and we will only collect the relevant information after obtaining your explicit consent. If you do not agree to the revised content, we will be unable to continue providing you with service.
